turns.user_message: I tried to shake this heavy feeling by going for a long walk and listening to my favorite playlist, but nothing actually worked. The quiet just kept echoing everything I have been avoiding lately. I keep telling myself it is just a rough patch, but the knot in my stomach refuses to loosen. It feels like I am constantly waiting for a shift that never really comes. I just want to feel light again without having to force it.

That same heavy feeling keeps creeping back every single week, no matter how many distractions I throw at it. I keep trying to reset my mindset by organizing my space or watching something funny, but the underlying tension always finds its way back. It is exhausting to pretend everything is fine when the silence between us just keeps stretching out. I feel like I am running in place while the distance quietly grows wider. I am starting to wonder if I will ever just feel at ease again.

I am completely drained from trying to manufacture some kind of normalcy out of this endless cycle of disappointment. Every little attempt to fix the mood just ends up highlighting how broken the rhythm between us really is. I keep replaying the last few months in my head, realizing how much of myself I have quietly folded away just to keep the peace. The weight of it all is suffocating, and I do not know how much longer I can pretend I am okay with this slow fade. I just feel so incredibly tired of carrying it alone.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This has been going on for a while.
